title: Uninstall confirm dialog dead after an install (no dialog opens)
description: Live-found 2026-06-16 during MPI-97 verify. After installing model(s), pressing UNINSTALL on a card opens NO confirm dialog at all — the click is dead renderer-side (backend route never hit; app.log shows no uninstall line; DevTools console clean, no JS error; /comfy/models/check returns 200 so the wrapper is fine). NOT the MPI-97/95 backend work (that's all verified). Suspected repro: install something, then uninstall right after — the 4-model install fires repeated renderList() via download:progress/models:checked, leaving the singleton _uninstallDialog's Overlays/popup state stale (ties to the ui:close-all-popups / MpiSlideOver opt-out machinery, [[project_slideover_close_popup_optout]]) so _uninstallDialog.el.show() silently no-ops. Fix: ensure the uninstall dialog .show() works after re-renders/installs (re-arm overlay state, or don't let install-driven renderList stomp popup state). App-side, no image. See brief.md.
